mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, im_type, im_display, webhook, secret, enable
mapper.select:
select
from dm_sys_messenger where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} order by im_type asc,gmt_create asc

select
from dm_sys_messenger where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{imId} order by im_type asc,gmt_create asc
mapper.delete: delete from dm_sys_messenger where id = #{imId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}
mapper.update: update dm_sys_messenger set im_display = #{newData}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{imId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}
update dm_sys_messenger set webhook = #{newData}, secret = #{newSecret}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{imId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}
